授業の概要・背景: This course is designed to prepare students for overseas experience prior to departure and ensure that they maximize this opportunity. At the end of this course the students will have an extensive knowledge of the country they will be living in and the program and institution they will belong to. This course also helps students better understand about some aspects of Japanese culture, various cultural stereotypes, and current Japan issues. The class is conducted entirely in English and students are expected to speak only in English for the entire 100 minutes each class. Much of the class time is used for student centered discussions about their target countries.
授業方法: Google Classroom will be used for some course information and assignment submissions, and, also for any outside of class contact with the teacher. This course is centered mainly on discussions based on the textbook information and individual autonomously researched information about a personally chosen study abroad destination. This is NOT a lecture style course, it requires interactive English only discussions with classmates every lesson.

ALL SESSION INFORMATION SUBJECT TO CHANGE AT INSTRUCTOR DISCRETION

【Startup Week】URL:https//~
"Online class（On-demand format）"／《90minutes》

Watch teacher video on course introduction, expectations, LMS set up; then complete follow up activities

1. Sign up for course LMS [Google Classroom]
2. Complete student needs analysis (Google Form)
第2回:
【Core Week 1】
"Face-to-face class"／ 《90minutes》

Topic: About your (target) country: Arts, Climate, Geography, History, Religion, Government, Industry, Language etc.
第3回:
【Core Week 2】
"Face-to-face class"／ 《90minutes》

Topic: The Arts & Wildlife: Topics covered include: Music, Dance, Literature, Theatre, Plants & Wildlife of the target country.
第4回:
【Core Week 3】
"Face-to-face class"／ 《90minutes》

Topic: Information for Visitors: In this unit the students have to research activities that can be done in their target country and at their target university campus.
第5回:
【Core Week 4】
"Face-to-face class"／ 《90minutes》

Topic: Additional Target Country Research & Presentation Skills Workshop: This session will include a presentation skills workshop in preparation for the first presentation and continue with researching about students' target destinations.
第6回:
【Core Week 5】
"Face-to-face class"／ 《90minutes》

Topic: Exploring the country’s Regions : This unit is designed to get the students researching what regions they should visit and what events they should attend within their target country.
第7回:
【Core Week 6】
"Face-to-face class"／ 《90minutes》

Topic: Presentation 1 Study Abroad presentation: This first presentation will be an individual 5 - 8 minute (time depends on class size) Power Point presentation.
第8回:
【Flex Hours】
"Online class（On-demand format）"／ 《90minutes》

Watch teacher video then complete follow up activities
第9回:
【Core Week 7】
"Face-to-face class"／ 《90minutes》

Topic: Time Management: Group discussions about time use. Time Audit Project explained: students will complete a time audit over 1 week in which they measure how much time they currently spend for study (along with travel, time spent sleeping, working etc.). The results of the audit will be discussed in the next lesson.
第10回:
【Core Week 8】
"Face-to-face class"／ 《90minutes》

Topic: Part 1: Time Audit Project Discussions: This lesson continues from the previous week by comparing the results of the student’s time audit with classmates. Part 2: Introduction to Japanese Culture.
第11回:
【Core Week 9】
"Face-to-face class"／ 《90minutes》

Topic: 

Japanese Cultural Awareness 1: Students have group discussions about Japanese culture and learn about Western/European stereotype images of Japan. Final Group Presentation information will be explained.
第12回:
【Core Week 10】
"Face-to-face class"／《90minutes》

Topic: Japanese Cultural Awareness 2: The students will work in their Presentation Groups together to discuss their research findings and work together to prepare and practice for their Group Presentations.
第13回:
【Core Week 11】
"Face-to-face class"／ 《90minutes》

Topic: Presentation 2 Japanese Culture: In groups, students will present their research to the rest of the class answering commonly asked questions about Japanese culture. Group presentations will be between 10 - 20 minutes depending on group sizes.
第14回:
【Core Week 12】
"Face-to-face class"／《90minutes》

Topic: Final Lesson Reflection & Cultural Stereotypes: Students will discuss cultural stereotypes and some prejudices about foreign culture. The class will conclude with end of term self-reflective discussions.
第15回:
【Flex Hours】
"Online class（Task-oriented format）"《90minutes》 
Follow instructions on Google Classroom and complete the assigned self-reflection task.
トピック.授業外学習2:
Students will be expected to complete homework assignments including required readings.

Students must have regular access to computers and the internet either at home or through an on-campus computer lab.

教科書/Required texts0: Students MUST have regular access to the Internet AND MUST join the Google Classroom for this course (Google Classroom information will be given to students in the first lesson). Students can use a pre-existing Google account or make a new Google account. The Google account name must be changed to English if students use a preexisting account (First Name, Last Name, for example: Ken Watanabe)
参考文献・資料/Reference books0: Dictionaries (electronic, smartphone, or paper) highly recommended.
学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。

備考Note0: If students are late to class, they are considered tardy. If more than 30 minutes late, they are considered absent. Two instances of tardiness are counted as one absence. One point per tardiness and two points per absence is taken off the final grade. A combination of 3 absences / 6 tardiness will result in a failing grade and the students expulsion from the class.
